Supervisor roles * Long\-term career development within a growing manufacturing business **What We Offer:** * Competitive hourly rate of €18\.00 (depending on experience) * Sign\-on bonus (terms apply) * Stable, long\-term employment in a growing company * Opportunities for training, development, and career progression * Supportive team environment and modern manufacturing facility

title: Grade V - ICT Cyber Security Support Officer
description: he Child and Family Agency was established on 1st January 2014 and is responsible for a range of statutory functions including provision of child protection, alternative care, specified regulatory services and a range of family support services. The Agency has commenced a major improvement programme with significant focus on Practice, Culture and Structure. The Agency currently has responsibility for a budget of circa €1\.2billion and delivers its services through over 5,500 people in 259 locations across the Country. The Child and Family Agency has responsibility for the following range of services: * Child Protection and Welfare * Parenting, Family Support and Early Help Services * Alternative Care * Birth Information \& Tracing and Adoption * Tusla Education Support Services (TESS) * Children’s Service Regulation * Counselling and Therapeutic Supports Further information is available on www.tusla.ie **About Tusla ICT** Tusla ICT provides the innovation, systems, and support to assist the Agency in delivering its services to children and families, as well as achieving its business and strategic objectives. Tusla has one of the largest ICT networks in the Irish Public Service, with approximately 6,000 users and 325 office/centre locations. The ICT directorate is responsible for delivering the following functions: ICT Networks, Server and Storage Management; Cyber Security, Business Continuity and Disaster Recovery; 0365 and Cloud Management; Application Development; Digital Transformation and Support; Data and Information Management; Service Delivery; ICT Business Support, Governance and ICT Programme Management.

title: Graduate Business Development Representative (SaaS Sales)
description: We're looking for a curious, ambitious and motivated **Graduate Business Development Representative** to join our Growth team at Alkimii. Looking to kick\-start your career in SaaS sales? We're looking for a curious, ambitious and motivated Graduate Business Development Representative to join our Growth team at Alkimii. You'll learn how modern B2B SaaS sales works from the ground up, working alongside experienced Business Development Executives and Account Executives while building the skills needed to grow into a future commercial leader. **What is Alkimii?** At Alkimii, we're on a mission to transform how hospitality businesses manage their people and property operations. Our platform helps hospitality teams streamline workflows, improve communication and make better operational decisions — all in one place. We're a fast\-growing SaaS company, and our Growth team plays a critical role in how we scale. **The Opportunity** This role is the first step on a structured commercial career path. Over your first year, you'll learn: * Modern SaaS prospecting * Outbound sales * Customer qualification * HubSpot CRM * Hospitality technology * Commercial communication * Pipeline generation You'll work closely with experienced Business Development Executives, Account Executives and Marketing professionals who will help accelerate your development. For high performers, this role provides a clear progression path into a **Business Development Executive (BDE)** position. **What You'll Be Doing** **Prospecting \& Research** • Research hotel groups and hospitality businesses across the UK and Ireland • Identify key decision makers within target accounts • Build prospect lists using LinkedIn, HubSpot and modern prospecting tools • Maintain accurate and structured prospect data **Outreach \& Opportunity Creation** • Use modern sales and AI\-powered prospecting tools to identify opportunities and improve productivity • Engage prospects through phone calls, email and LinkedIn • Introduce Alkimii to potential customers • Generate interest and book qualified meetings • Support outbound campaigns alongside Marketing • Learn and apply best practices in SaaS prospecting **CRM \& Pipeline Management** • Maintain accurate records in HubSpot • Track prospect engagement and activity • Log calls, emails and meetings consistently • Ensure CRM data remains accurate and up to date **Learning \& Development** • Complete Alkimii Academy certification • Shadow Business Development Executives and Account Executives • Participate in call reviews and coaching sessions • Learn objection handling and discovery techniques • Build a strong understanding of our product and industry **What Success Looks Like** **In your first 3 months** • Complete your onboarding and training programme • Develop confidence speaking with prospects • Understand our customers, product and market • Begin generating qualified meetings **In your first 6 months** • Consistently generate qualified meetings • Meet or exceed activity targets • Build strong prospecting habits • Become comfortable managing your own workload **In your first 12 months** • Operate independently • Consistently create pipeline opportunities • Demonstrate strong commercial awareness • Be ready to progress into a Business Development Executive role **We Think You'll Thrive If You:** • Are naturally curious • Enjoy speaking with people • Are resilient and positive • Like working towards goals • Are coachable and eager to learn • Take ownership of your work • Want to build a career in sales, business development or SaaS **Requirements** • Excellent written and verbal communication skills • Strong organisational skills and attention to detail • Comfortable learning new technology and systems • Eligibility to work in Ireland • Fluent English **Nice To Have** • Previous customer\-facing experience • Hospitality experience • Sales, retail or service industry experience • Familiarity with CRM systems • Business, Marketing or related degree **What Can You Expect From Us?** 💰 Competitive salary and commission plan 🎓 Structured training and development programme 🚀 Clear progression path into a Business Development Executive role 🩺 Wellbeing programmes, learning and growth opportunities 🧘 Flexible working week because we take productivity and wellbeing seriously 👩 💻 Hybrid working model 💳 CleverCards employee benefits 🙋 €4,000 Employee Referral Programme 👯 Quarterly team meet\-ups and annual gathering Before You Apply... We: • Enjoy being up early enough to see the sunrise • Discipline ourselves with morning workouts • Feed our curiosity with a good book • Don't take ourselves too seriously • Constantly ask ourselves how we can make it easier for our customers

title: Graduate Energy Consultant
description: We are currently seeking applications for trainee energy consultants. This would suit any graduate in the built environment in fields such as : * Building Surveying, * Architectural Technology, * Mechanical Engineering, * Construction Management, * Building Services Engineering etc. All training will be provided and paid for. The candidate will start off as a domestic BER assessor in an environment where the necessary experience will be gained to develop into an experienced energy consultant. This could be an exciting new career as a professional in a rapidly growing industry. The role of an energy consultant typically involves three days in the office and two days surveying properties. The successful candidate will be focused on providing technical specifications and advice for customers, most of whom are contractors carrying out energy retrofit projects. Our office is based in Tullyallen Village, Co. Louth. In addition we do not operate on a rigid schedule for office days and use flexible working hours i.e. start early and early finish or vice versa. There is full use of a company vehicle at all times and so no commuting costs. **Requirements:** * The entry requirements to become a registered BER assessor are either: * A) Minimum QQI Level 6 in a construction related qualification, * B) Minimum QQI Level 6 in a non construction related qualification, but with at least two years relevant construction experience, * Ideally candidates would have a qualification in building surveying, construction studies, engineering, architectural technology, project management, civil engineering or similar, however, this is not a requirement and all candidates will be considered, * Full clean driving license. **Essential Skills**: * Possess good communication skills, * Customer focused, * Ability to work on your own initiative The successful candidate will have the chance to work alongside a team of experienced retrofit professionals \& gain knowledge of domestic and commercial energy ratings, building regulations, air tightness, ventilation validation and energy retrofits of dwellings. A generous package is available for the right candidate. For more information see below links to our websites: www.ventilationvalidation.ie www.necber.ie Job Types: Full\-time, Permanent Pay: €31,200\.00\-€35,000\.00 per year Licence/Certification: * full driving licence (required) Work authorisation: * Ireland (required) Work Location: In person

title: Graduate Engineer - Engines-EN
description: Do You Want To Progress Your Career With The Global Leader In Aviation? Under The Guidance Of Senior Engineers, Our Graduate Engineers Will Be Given The Opportunity To Gain Hands\-on Experience Across Our Technical Support Services Department Which Includes The Engine Management Technical Support Services Department specializes in managing powerplants for our clients, including engine phase in and phase out, shop visit oversight, monitoring engine condition, records review and conducting maintenance forecasts. As a Powerplant Graduate Engineer, you'll gain experience providing support to our clients, with involvement in a large variance of projects ensuring that there is never a dull moment for our graduate engineers. On completion of the programme, you’ll be the type of person who has the proven ability to solve problems with sound judgment and have effective communication skills as well as excellent organizational skills and computer skills. As part of the programme, you will be mentored by senior engineers, have the opportunity to rotate across the different engineering services departments and be involved in new and existing projects. All the above will provide you with the best training in the industry, while following a clear and structured development path. **Education Required** Applicants will have recently completed or are in the final year of a Technical Degree (B.Eng, B.Sc etc.) **The Package** We offer a competitive salary as well as a range of benefits. **Next Steps** This is an excellent opportunity to join our Engineering graduate programme and to join a multi\-award\-winning company, which is the global leader in its field. **About CAE** *At CAE, our mission is clear: to help make the world a safer place. For nearly 80 years, we’ve driven innovation in simulation, training, and mission readiness to support critical operations worldwide. By leveraging advanced technologies, we empower our customers to operate smarter, faster, and more sustainably. Join a purpose\-driven organization where bold ideas are encouraged, collaboration drives progress, and your growth fuels our shared success.* **Position Type** Regular **Equal Opportunity \& Accommodations** *CAE is committed to providing equal opportunities to all applicants, regardless of race, nationality, color, religion, sex, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, disability, neurodiversity, veteran status, age, or other characteristics protected by law. We encourage applicants who may not meet every qualification to apply. Reasonable accommodations are available—contact your recruiter or email* *CAECarrieres\-Careers@cae.com* *if needed.* **Data Privacy** Privacy Statement \| CAE *As part of our process, we may use AI‑supported tools to help review applications, with human decision‑making at every step. CAE thanks all applicants for their interest. However, only those whose background and experience match the requirements of the role will be contacted.*

title: Graduate Mechanical Design Engineer – Dublin
description: * Permanent position available with a considerable portfolio of works for the next 5\+ years * To build your career by assisting in the delivery of ‘leading edge’ engineering projects. * To work with a vibrant, agile and multi\-functional team in delivering projects on time, safely, to budget and to the required quality standards. * To benefit from Kirby’s Career Development Programmes that will enhance your leadership capability. * To work with the best. * Excellent package on offer with room for negotiations **About Kirby Group Engineering** Kirby Group Engineering is an international multi\-disciplinary engineering services contractor and leading provider of high\-value engineering services to a number of ‘blue chip’ companies. Operating across Ireland, the UK, Europe and South Africa, Kirby has become the engineering service provider of choice in growth segments such as pharmaceuticals, data centres and power transmission and distribution. Our culture is innovative, collaborative and performance focused. The successful candidate will have the opportunity to grow and develop in a company committed to developing talent and rewarding performance. **Role Purpose** The role of a Graduate Mechanical Design Engineer is to execute engineering and design activities of the project. To conduct design reviews, project engineering, commissioning support ensuring consistent application of agreed procedures and utilization of standard forms. Graduate Mechanical Design Engineer’s Roles \& Responsibilities **General** * Assist and conduct the mechanical engineering and design activities on the project. * Support mechanical package owners. * Ensure the design management process is being followed on the project by either taking on the role directly. **EHS** * Read and understand EHS Plan. * Read, understand and promote the mechanical safe systems of work (MSSW) **Procurement** * Assist in the production of pre\-qualification packs (PQP) for design services and RFQ’s for equipment. Forward to project quantity surveyor for Subcontractor Package or Procurement Manager for Purchases. **RFQ Shall Include** * Scope of Works * Drawings and Specifications * Compliance, Deviation and Exclusion Matrices * Schedule – deliveries, installation and commissioning requirements PQQ shall be in line with MP17 – Selection and appointment of design consultants. * Mark\-up equipment and design services quotes to advise the project manager of the correct scope that aligns with the technical submittal and design brief. * Develop and update procurement \& design schedule/tracker with project planner. Continuously update the tracker until all technical submittals achieve status A, design deliverables accepted and materials/equipment have been delivered. **Quality** * Be engaged and utilize the documentation workflow for the project. Documentation generation, peer review, submission, re\-submission, distribution etc. * Review, comment and understand Quality Plan. * Assist in the development the project scope specific ITP considering project specification, client and local requirements. * Assist in the development of system tracker including equipment detail, interfacing details (electrical \& control), commissioning checklists and walkdown requirements * Review and understand any local authority requirements. * Develop lessons learned log of the project and continually update. * Indicate what the learning was * What the outcome or mitigations were * Indicate whether it was an internal finding or should be reported externally * Indicate if it was a cost, time or both impacts. * Assist in the O\&Ms production in line with the specification and agreed program. **Planning** * Understand and provide input and updates to the project schedule. * Input ROJ dates of CFCI equipment onto the equipment tracker. * Request and monitor the OFCI delivery dates. **Engineering \& Design** * Complete familiarisation and technical reviews on projects and record notes. Pose questions to the estimators and submit relevant RFI’s for clarifications on design/ scope. * Assist in the development of systems tracker along with equipment tag references, details and interfaces. * Assist in the development and tracking of design responsibility matrix/ contractor design portion (CDP). * Assist with the development and input into Design Deviation and Exclusions Log to ensure the team are aware of the agreed deviations and exclusions from design. * Validate the design using the request for information (RFI), design review process and performing the appropriate high level technical calculations. * Assist in the development of schematic’s when gaps exist in the design. * Review and understand The BIM execution plan, the Commissioning Plan and the Tracking Plan for the project. * Review the federated BIM model. * Review the coordinated drawings for construction to ensure it is in compliance with the P\&ID’s and schematics and that there is sufficient access to plant and equipment for commissioning, maintenance and replacement. * Development and track Technical Submittals until Status A. * Assist in the management of change from a technical perspective, updating change logs and schedules as required. * Tag Devices and instrumentation, spot each device on site in consultation with controls vendor and designer. * Attend biweekly technical meetings with members of the design team, subcontractors and internal project engineering team. * Assist in the verification of pipe and pump, duct and fan sizing and ensure design selections are suitable. * Assist in the production of the O\&M manuals in compliance with the specification. * Execute the project design and engineering process to ensure compliance. * Assist in technical review of tenders when required. * Attend and contribute to engineering and design kick\-off meeting at the outset of the project and record the minutes when required. * Attend and contribute to weekly engineering and design meetings and record the minutes when required. * Own action items identified during meetings and close them in a timely manner. **Communication** * Contribute to the development of weekly engineering and design reports and trackers. * Populate the project risk log and highlight any risks that arise to the project manager. * Manage and resolve risks and potential roadblocks with mitigation and management plans. **Commercial** * Understand the commercial fundamentals of a project including, budgets, material substation. * Understand commercial impacts of potential variation and assist the quantity surveyor in compiling variations. * Advise the project quantity surveyor and the project manager of any potential cost impacts to the project on an ongoing basis. **HR** * Attend CPD workshops and events. * Proactively and vigilantly keep information secure and fully comply with the Kirby Information Security Management System (ISMS). *For more information on this role, or other Construction / Engineering opportunities across Ireland, the UK, Europe, or South Africa please review our careers page (Vacancies – Kirby Group Careers) or contact the Talent Acquisition Team at Kirby Group in confidence on \+353 (0\)1 454 0411\.* *Kirby Group Engineering is an equal opportunities employer. We are committed to fostering an inclusive workplace and welcome applications from all suitably qualified candidates, regardless of race, gender, disability, religion, sexual orientation, or age.*

title: Graduate Program
description: **Launch Your Global Career After Graduation** **Teach English in China \| Full\-Time \| Entry\-Level Friendly** Just graduated (or graduating soon) and not ready for a desk job? Want to travel, gain international work experience, and build transferable skills while earning a competitive salary? **English 1** is hiring **recent graduates and early\-career professionals** to teach English in China. No prior teaching experience required. Full training, visa sponsorship, and structured career development are included. This is an ideal **first job** , **graduate program alternative** , or **gap\-year career launch** for ambitious, globally minded graduates. **What you'll do** * Teach English to young learners aged 3–16 in a fun, interactive, and immersive classroom setting. * Deliver high\-energy lessons using English 1’s award\-winning curriculum and digital tools. * Provide constructive feedback and help students build confidence in their English skills. * Take part in school events, cultural activities, and student engagement programs. **What you’ll get** * Competitive salary \+ performance bonus after 6 months * 21 days paid leave (10 days paid leave \+ 11 days statutory holidays) * Flight allowance * International health insurance (co\-paid) * Airport pick\-up support * \*\*Sponsored legal Z work visa \+ up to 2 weeks sponsored hotel stay * Comprehensive induction training, ongoing support, and fully prepared teaching materials * TEFL certificate \+ skill development \& career advancement * Distance learning courses (Level 6 Trinity College CertPT, DELTM) * English 1\-organized social and cultural activities \+ free Mandarin Chinese lessons *The hotel accommodation for the first two weeks will be deemed as a sponsorship upon successful completion of the first\-year contract. \*\*Sponsored legal Z work visa expenses will be reimbursed.* **Who we’re looking for** * A bachelor’s degree (in any subject) * A valid passport * A genuine interest in education, travel, and cultural exchange. * ESL certification (TEFL, TESOL, CELTA) is a plus\- we can sponsor * Clean background check. **Why work at English 1?** * Teachers are at the core of everything we do at English 1 * Over **30 years** of success in China with **200\+ schools** in **50\+ cities** . * Strong presence in **China** and **Indonesia** . * **Professional development** and career **advancement opportunities** . Whether you’re a recent graduate, or exploring your first international role, this is your chance to **earn, travel, and grow professionally and personally** . **Apply now and start your international career with English 1\.** \#EntryLevel \#Graduates \#EnglishTeacher \#ESL \#TEFL \#TeachingJobs \#GraduateJobs \#hiring \#jobs \#entrylevel \#teachercns \#graduates \#esl \#tefl \#teach \#JobAlert \#NowHiring \#JobOpening \#CareerOpportunities \#JobSearch \#WorkWithUs \#LinkedInJobs \#JobSeeker \#OpenToWork \#CareerGoals \#JobHunt \#NewJob \#CollegeGraduates \#BachelorsDegree \#RecentGrad \#ClassOf2026 \#JobSearch \#CareerSuccess \#EntryLevelJobs \#HiringNow \#YoungProfessionals \#CareerGrowth \#Networking \#LinkedInNetworking \#FutureLeaders \#UniversityAlumni \#HigherEd \#AlumniNetwork \#CollegeSuccess

title: Graduate Programme - Insurance - September 2026
description: By joining Sedgwick, you'll be part of something truly meaningful. It’s what our 33,000 colleagues do every day for people around the world who are facing the unexpected. We invite you to grow your career with us, experience our caring culture, and enjoy work\-life balance. Here, there’s no limit to what you can achieve. Newsweek Recognizes Sedgwick as America’s Greatest Workplaces National Top Companies Certified as a Great Place to Work® Fortune Best Workplaces in Financial Services \& Insurance Graduate Programme \- Insurance \- September 2026 **Graduate Loss Adjuster Programme (Ireland)** **Start your career in casualty \& liability claims with Sedgwick** Are you a recent graduate looking for a career where no two days are the same? Want to build real expertise while helping people through challenging situations? Our **Graduate Loss Adjuster Programme** is designed to give you everything you need to become a confident, skilled casualty or liability adjuster. **What you’ll get** * **Structured training** * Learn the fundamentals of loss adjusting, including handling casualty and liability claims * **Mentorship from day one** * Be paired with an experienced adjuster who will guide and support your development * **Professional qualification support** * We’ll support you to achieve your **APA insurance qualification (January 2027 sitting)** * **Real experience** * Work on live claims and build practical skills from the start **What the role involves** As a Graduate Loss Adjuster, you will: * Support the management of **casualty and liability claims** from start to finish * Work with customers, insurers and third parties to investigate claims * Gather and assess information to understand what happened and what is covered * Help agree fair settlements * Keep accurate records and prepare reports * Build relationships with clients and stakeholders * Learn how to manage your own caseload over time You’ll split your time between **field visits** (homes or business premises) and **office\-based work** , developing both technical and people skills. **Why this role is different** * You’ll help people during difficult situations (e.g. injury claims or liability disputes) * You’ll develop **investigation, negotiation and problem\-solving skills** * You’ll gain a **clear career path in insurance and claims** * You’ll be part of a supportive, experienced team **Who we’re looking for** We’re looking for graduates who are: * Curious and eager to learn * Strong communicators (clear, confident and empathetic) * Organised and detail\-focused * Good problem\-solvers * Interested in building a long\-term career in insurance / claims **Requirements** * Degree in **Law, Business, Construction or Criminology** * Full **clean driving licence** (essential for site visits) * Willingness to travel across Ireland when required **Why join Sedgwick** * **Career growth** – clear progression and development opportunities * **Supportive environment** – mentorship and structured learning * **Meaningful work** – make a real difference to people and businesses * **Inclusive culture** – a workplace that values diversity and fairness Sedgwick is an Equal Opportunity Employer. The statements contained in this document are intended to describe the general nature and level of work being performed by a colleague assigned to this description. They are not intended to constitute a comprehensive list of functions, duties, or local variances. Sedgwick retains the discretion to add or to change the duties of the position at any time.

title: Graduate Sales Executive (Greek Market)
description: **About Revolut** People deserve more from their money. More visibility, more control, and more freedom. Since 2015, Revolut has been on a mission to deliver just that. Our powerhouse of products — including spending, saving, investing, exchanging, travelling, and more — help our 75\+ million customers get more from their money every day. As we continue our lightning\-fast growth,‌ 2 things are essential to our success: our people and our culture. In recognition of our outstanding employee experience, we've been certified as a Great Place to Work™. So far, we have 13,000\+ people working around the world, from our offices and remotely, to help us achieve our mission. And we're looking for more brilliant people. People who love building great products, redefining success, and turning the complexity of a chaotic world into the simplicity of a beautiful solution. **About The Role** Our Sales team powers customer growth around the world. From prospecting to acquisition and activation, they own their market segments, solve complex problems, and help more customers discover the value of Revolut with a sharp, solution\-oriented approach. We're looking for a Sales Executive to join our Graduate Sales Programme, which offers an unparalleled opportunity for ambitious graduates, regardless of prior experience, to join a high\-performing, international team. You'll be at the forefront of delivering cutting\-edge financial solutions to customers while building key relationships. You’ll kick things off with a focused bootcamp, complete with workshops, lectures, and hands\-on training to sharpen your commercial and communication skills. Once you're up to speed, you'll dive straight into the on\-the\-job experience by working with real clients. Watch this video from our team members about what goes into being an Account Executive at Revolut. Up to shape what's next in finance? Let's get in touch. **What You'll Be Doing** * Outreaching prospects across multiple touch points and channels, with an emphasis on cold\-calling * Developing and executing a robust lead\-sourcing strategy by identifying key verticals, diversifying your prospects base, and maintaining consistent activity levels * Building and managing your own pipeline, from prospecting to closing and account management, maximising adoption and upsell/cross\-sell opportunities * Liaising customer relationships with internal stakeholders to ensure a smooth experience, from getting started to daily usage * Being autonomous to effectively balance your time (prospect vs. close vs. upsell), activate internal resources, and engage your team * Using solution\-based selling to understand customer needs and communicate the value proposition * Becoming a product expert on Revolut Business, its market positioning, and the solutions it offers, backed by relevant, compelling case studies **What You'll Need** * Fluency in English and Greek * To have graduated from university in 2024 or 2025 * Excellent communication skills and articulation over the phone * Impeccable literacy skills (email, LinkedIn outreach) * A drive to launch a career in a high\-performing sales culture * An interest in the financial industry **Nice to have** * Previous internship or experience in a high\-performance, fast\-paced environment, with exposure to strategic thinking, analytical tasks, or client\-facing work Building a global financial super app isn’t enough. Our Revoluters are a priority, and that’s why in 2021 we launched our inaugural D\&I Framework, designed to help us thrive and grow everyday. We're not just doing this because it's the right thing to do. We’re doing it because we know that seeking out diverse talent and creating an inclusive workplace is the way to create exceptional, innovative products and services for our customers. That’s why we encourage applications from people with diverse backgrounds and experiences to join this multicultural, hard\-working team. **Important notice for candidates:** Job scams are on the rise. Please keep these guidelines in mind when applying for any open roles. * Only apply through official Revolut channels. We don’t use any third\-party services or platforms for our recruitment. * Always double\-check the emails you receive. title: Graduate Sales Executive (Italian Market)
description: **About Revolut** People deserve more from their money. More visibility, more control, and more freedom. Since 2015, Revolut has been on a mission to deliver just that. Our powerhouse of products — including spending, saving, investing, exchanging, travelling, and more — help our 75\+ million customers get more from their money every day. As we continue our lightning\-fast growth,‌ 2 things are essential to our success: our people and our culture. In recognition of our outstanding employee experience, we've been certified as a Great Place to Work™. So far, we have 13,000\+ people working around the world, from our offices and remotely, to help us achieve our mission. And we're looking for more brilliant people. People who love building great products, redefining success, and turning the complexity of a chaotic world into the simplicity of a beautiful solution. **About The Role** Our Sales team powers customer growth around the world. From prospecting to acquisition and activation, they own their market segments, solve complex problems, and help more customers discover the value of Revolut with a sharp, solution\-oriented approach. We're looking for a Sales Executive to join our Graduate Sales Programme, which offers an unparalleled opportunity for ambitious graduates, regardless of prior experience, to join a high\-performing, international team. You'll be at the forefront of delivering cutting\-edge financial solutions to customers while building key relationships. You’ll kick things off with a focused bootcamp, complete with workshops, lectures, and hands\-on training to sharpen your commercial and communication skills. Once you're up to speed, you'll dive straight into the on\-the\-job experience by working with real clients. Watch this video from our team members about what goes into being an Account Executive at Revolut. Up to shape what's next in finance? Let's get in touch. **What You'll Be Doing** * Outreaching prospects across multiple touch points and channels, with an emphasis on cold\-calling * Developing and executing a robust lead\-sourcing strategy by identifying key verticals, diversifying your prospects base, and maintaining consistent activity levels * Building and managing your own pipeline, from prospecting to closing and account management, maximising adoption and upsell/cross\-sell opportunities * Liaising customer relationships with internal stakeholders to ensure a smooth experience, from getting started to daily usage * Being autonomous to effectively balance your time (prospect vs. close vs. upsell), activate internal resources, and engage your team * Using solution\-based selling to understand customer needs and communicate the value proposition * Becoming a product expert on Revolut Business, its market positioning, and the solutions it offers, backed by relevant, compelling case studies **What You'll Need** * Fluency in English and Italian * To have graduated from university in 2024 or 2025 * Excellent communication skills and articulation over the phone * Impeccable literacy skills (email, LinkedIn outreach) * A drive to launch a career in a high\-performing sales culture * An interest in the financial industry **Nice to have** * Previous internship or experience in a high\-performance, fast\-paced environment, with exposure to strategic thinking, analytical tasks, or client\-facing work Building a global financial super app isn’t enough. Our Revoluters are a priority, and that’s why in 2021 we launched our inaugural D\&I Framework, designed to help us thrive and grow everyday. We're not just doing this because it's the right thing to do. We’re doing it because we know that seeking out diverse talent and creating an inclusive workplace is the way to create exceptional, innovative products and services for our customers. That’s why we encourage applications from people with diverse backgrounds and experiences to join this multicultural, hard\-working team. **Important notice for candidates:** Job scams are on the rise. Please keep these guidelines in mind when applying for any open roles. * Only apply through official Revolut channels. We don’t use any third\-party services or platforms for our recruitment. * Always double\-check the emails you receive. Make sure all communications are being done through official Revolut emails, with an @revolut.com domain. **We won't ask for payment or personal financial information during the hiring process.** If anyone does ask you for this, it’s a scam. Report it immediately. title: Graduate Sales Programme
description: **Location: Sandyford, Dublin** **Full\-time role** **Salary: €30,000 \+ commission** **The Opportunity** Join an accredited immersive eighteen\-month graduate programme that will give you exposure to work across our various brands in the utilities sector, including PrepayPower and Yuno Energy — leaders in the utility sector in Ireland. The programme provides valuable sales experience, operational exposure and allows you to build professional and personal skills to forge a career in Sales or beyond. **Overview** The programme is designed to prepare you for successful careers in sales through rotations, coaching, and hands\-on experience. The role offers a unique blend of telesales and field sales experience, providing exposure to multiple sales channels and a strong foundation for a long\-term career in sales. After successfully completing the programme, there will be the possibility to progress to a commercial team. **Who Is It For?** * Recent graduates (0–2 years' experience) * Degrees in Business, Marketing, Economics, or any discipline with strong commercial acumen * Desired skills: * + Communication \& persuasion + Resilience \& adaptability + Curiosity \& learning agility + Results\-driven mindset ### ### **Benefits** * **Competitive salary and bonus structure** * **Private Pension Contribution Scheme** with Zurich Life * **Discounted Health Insurance \- Group Scheme** with Laya Healthcare * **Employee Assistance Program** provided by TELUS Health * **Free Online GP Services** via Webdoctor.ie * **Excellent career progression opportunities** in a growing company with strong market presence * **Fast\-paced, friendly team environment** * **Continuous training and development** * **Annual leave that increases with service** * **Exclusive PrepayPower Staff Tariff** * **Modern offices** with excellent facilities in Sandyford * **Active CSR, Wellness, and Social initiatives** plus great social events * **Refer\-a\-Friend Scheme** * **TaxSaver Travel Tickets \& Bike\-to\-Work Scheme** ### **About Yuno Energy** Since entering the Irish market in late 2023, we've been transforming the residential energy sector with a bold mission: to help consumers save energy and money through a data\-driven, app\-first experience. We are redefining how people understand and engage with their energy. Our innovative approach delivers radical transparency and rewards energy efficiency. With just a few taps, customers can gain a clear view of their energy habits—tracking every hour, unit, and cent of their usage. In 2025, together with PrepayPower, we proudly reached over 350,000 customer connections. **Why Work at Yuno Energy** At Yuno Energy, we believe work should be both challenging and rewarding. Ranked among Ireland's Great Places to Work*,* we offer ambitious individuals a dynamic, fast\-paced environment with exciting opportunities for growth. We are proud to be an Equal Opportunity Employer, committed to treating all employees, customers, and stakeholders with dignity and respect. We value diverse talent and are dedicated to building an inclusive workplace that drives innovation and delivers exceptional services. We encourage applications from people of all backgrounds and experiences. Yuno Energy is part of the Yuno Group, alongside PrepayPower and firmus Energy. With almost 600 employees and growing, we are shaping the future of electricity, gas, and broadband in Ireland. Join us and become part of a dynamic, ambitious team that's shaping the future of energy. **Privacy** By applying for this role, you agree to Yuno Energy processing your personal data for recruitment purposes. We handle all applications in line with our Privacy Notice You can view our Careers Privacy Policy \| Ireland's Newest Electricity Provider \- Yuno Energy for more information.

title: HR & Business Operations Graduate
description: **Protex AI is the AI Safety and Operations Intelligence Company.** At Protex AI, we are at the forefront of AI\-driven computer vision, building a safer, smarter industrial workplace with an intelligent operating system that redefines how facilities operate. Backed by top\-tier global investors, we recently secured a $36 million Series B to accelerate our mission. Industry leaders like DHL, Amazon, and Tesla trust Protex AI to drive measurable safety improvements, achieving an average 64% risk reduction within just three months of deployment. Operating in 20\+ countries, Protex is the go\-to safety partner for Fortune 500 manufacturing and logistics enterprises, transforming workplace safety with real\-time, AI\-powered insights. This is not a typical graduate role. As we scale globally, you will sit at the very centre of the business , working across People, Operations, Facilities, Finance, and Legal to keep a fast\-moving, international company running smoothly. You will support teams and stakeholders across multiple geographies, helping to build and maintain the operational foundations that allow a growing global company to move quickly and effectively. No two days will look the same, and that is exactly the point. We are a company that embraces technology and AI as a core part of how we operate. You will be expected to use AI tools confidently, whether drafting documents, researching suppliers or automating repetitive tasks. If you already experiment with AI in your daily life, you will fit right in. **KEY RESPONSIBILITIES** 1\. PEOPLE \& HR SUPPORT * Support the People team with onboarding coordination — contracts, starter packs, and IT setup requests — across multiple regions * Help maintain accurate employee records, org charts, and HR documentation as the company scales * Assist with scheduling and logistics for interviews, performance review cycles, and team events globally * Support the coordination of employee engagement initiatives, company communications , surveys, and culture programmes * Act as a first point of contact for general People queries, escalating where appropriate 2\. BUSINESS OPERATIONS * Support the smooth day\-to\-day running of business operations across a growing, international organisation * Help maintain operational trackers, dashboards, and process documentation as we scale into new markets * Assist with cross\-functional projects — from research and data gathering to drafting updates and presentations * Use AI tools proactively to streamline workflows, automate repetitive tasks, and improve how we work * Manage internal communications and follow\-ups to ensure actions are captured and progressed 3\. OFFICE MANAGEMENT \& FACILITIES * Oversee the day\-to\-day running of the office environment — supplies, equipment, and vendor relationships * Act as the primary point of contact for facilities queries, maintenance requests, and health \& safety compliance * Manage meeting room bookings, visitor coordination, and office access * Support planning and logistics for company events, offsites, and global town halls * Own the relationship with building management and key service providers 4\. FINANCE SUPPORT * Assist with purchase order (PO) creation, invoice processing, and expense management * Support month\-end processes including cost tracking and basic budget reconciliation * Help maintain financial records and filing in line with company policy * Liaise with the Finance team on approvals and payment queries from internal stakeholders across regions 5\. CO\-FOUNDER SUPPORT * Provide diary management support for the Co\-Founders — scheduling meetings, coordinating international travel where required * Handle ad hoc personal and business requests with discretion and professionalism **THE GRADUATE WE'RE LOOKING FOR** ESSENTIAL * Degree\-educated (any discipline), with a strong academic record or demonstrable aptitude * Genuinely enthusiastic — brings positive energy and curiosity every single day * Comfortable with technology and actively uses AI tools (Claude, ChatGPT, Notion AI, or similar) in everyday work or life * Highly organised with exceptional attention to detail — nothing falls through the cracks * A natural multi\-tasker who is comfortable switching between very different priorities at pace * Strong written and verbal communication skills — clear, concise, and professional across cultures * Proactive and self\-motivated — identifies what needs doing and gets on with it * Discreet and trustworthy when handling sensitive or confidential information * Comfortable with ambiguity; thrives when given autonomy rather than a rigid brief * Fast learner who asks good questions and is not afraid to figure things out DESIRABLE * Previous internship or work experience in a fast\-growth startup, professional services, or operations environment * Exposure to HR systems (e.g. BambooHR, Rippling, HiBob) or project management tools (e.g. Notion, Asana, Monday.com) * Has built personal workflows or automations using AI tools (e.g. Zapier, Make, or AI\-assisted drafting) * Interest in finance, operations, or people functions as a long\-term career pathway * Experience working in or supporting an international or multi\-site organisation * Experience providing administrative or coordination support to senior stakeholders TECH \& AI COMFORT — WHAT WE MEAN You don't need to be a developer. But you should be genuinely curious about technology and comfortable picking up new tools quickly. Familiarity with AI tools is a strong plus — and we will support you in building expertise further. **WHAT WE OFFER** * Compensation package of €35,000 per year, as well as benefits * A front\-row seat at a fast\-growing global company — your work will matter from day one * Real breadth of exposure across People, Operations, Finance, Legal, and the Founders * The chance to help build and shape operational processes as we scale internationally * Direct access to experienced founders and senior leadership * Competitive graduate salary with clear progression pathways * A culture that invests in AI tools, learning, and doing things smarter * Hybrid working and a vibrant, collaborative office environment * Regular company events, team socials, and a strong people\-first culture **KEY COMPETENCIES** Candidates will be assessed against the following core competencies throughout the hiring process: Adaptability \& Flexibility Comfortable moving between very different tasks — from diary management to cross\-border compliance filing — with equal care and quality. Stakeholder Management Builds positive relationships at all levels and across cultures, from office suppliers to Co\-Founders, and communicates effectively in all directions. Ownership \& Initiative Takes responsibility for outcomes rather than waiting to be directed. Proactively flags risks and proposes solutions. Rigour \& Accuracy Produces accurate, well\-organised work consistently — especially critical when supporting finance, legal, and people functions across geographies. Discretion \& Integrity Handles confidential information with maturity and sound judgement at all times. Drive \& Ambition Brings energy, enthusiasm, and a genuine desire to grow. Sees this role as a launchpad and is motivated to develop across multiple disciplines in a global environment. **SOUND LIKE YOU?** This role is deliberately broad — and the right person will be energised by that, not daunted. We want a bright, enthusiastic graduate who loves technology, moves fast, and takes real pride in making things run smoothly across a growing global business. Someone who is just as happy sorting out the office as they are chasing down a contract signature, or helping onboard a new joiner in another country. If that sounds like you — we'd love to hear from you. Protex AI is an inclusive and equal opportunities employer. We are committed to creating an equitable workplace for everyone regardless of gender, civil status, family status, sexual orientation, religion, age, disability, education level, or race.

title: Housekeeping Assistant Elm Green
description: **An Exciting opportunity for the right candidate.** We are looking for a Domestic Assistant/Cleaner to work in our Eln Green Nursing Home Dunsink Lane Dublin as part of Trinity Care Group a well\-respected, multi\-award\-winning Nursing Home Group, part of the international DomusVi Group. We provide private residential, convalescent and rehabilitative care in our purpose\-built Nursing Homes. We have centres in Dublin, Meath, Louth, Kildare, Kilkenny, and Cavan. **Key Responsibilities:** To ensure the highest standard of cleanliness in all areas at all times. Responsible for carrying out of your duties in the laundry including bed linens etc., and personal items for clients. **Duties** : * To be responsible for the thorough servicing of your allocated area to the defined standard. * To offer excellent service to all clients/visitors and ensure that all queries, complaints and compliments are relayed back to your supervisor. * To maintain the appearance of your trolley, press and working area at all times, restocking your trolley before going off duty, and ensuring presses are secure. * To have an understanding of usage, safety and hazards of all chemicals and cleaning products. * Record keeping. * Ensure that you maintain the cleanliness and good order of your area of assignment and associated areas to the highest possible standard. * Ensure efficient and economical use of materials and equipment. * To adhere to specifications, standards and procedures while at work. * To report mechanical defects and needs for repairs. * To take all necessary steps to ensure the maximum security of your area of assignment and all equipment and supplies contained therein. * To carry our any reasonable requests by management **Skills:** Cleaning, chemicals, Domestic Cleaning **Important Notice For candidates** Job scams are on the rise. Please keep these guidelines in mind when applying for any open roles. Always double\-check the emails you receive. Make sure all communications are being done through official Trinity Care emails, with an @trinitycare domain.

title: Hybrid IT Support Engineer (On-Prem & Cloud)
description: **Hybrid IT Support Engineer** We are seeking a highly skilled **Hybrid IT Support Engineer** to lead and support **system upgrades, migrations, and infrastructure enhancements** in a healthcare environment. This role ensures the reliability, security, and efficiency of **critical IT systems**, including **Electronic Health Records (EHR), clinical applications, servers, and cloud environments**. The ideal candidate will have expertise in **healthcare IT infrastructure**, regulatory compliance (**JCI, HIQA**), and IT service management best practices. **Job Title** Hybrid IT Support Engineer **Department** Information Technology (IT) **Reporting To** IT Infrastructure Manager / IT Operations Manager **Location** Hybrid (Hospital Sites and Remote Support) **Job Purpose** The Hybrid IT Support Engineer is responsible for providing technical support across hospital and healthcare environments, ensuring the availability, security, and performance of clinical and non\-clinical IT systems. The role involves supporting healthcare staff, maintaining end\-user devices, troubleshooting infrastructure issues, and assisting with healthcare applications while adhering to data protection and patient confidentiality requirements. **Key Responsibilities** **Technical Support** * Provide 1st and 2nd line IT support to hospital staff, clinicians, administrative teams, and external partners. * Diagnose and resolve hardware, software, network, printer, and application issues. * Manage incidents and service requests through the IT Service Management (ITSM) platform. * Escalate complex issues to specialist teams where appropriate. * Participate in on\-call and out\-of\-hours support when required. **Clinical Systems Support** * Support Electronic Health Record (EHR) and Patient Administration Systems (PAS). * Assist users with clinical applications, medical devices, and healthcare software. * Ensure minimal disruption to patient\-facing services during system outages or maintenance. * Coordinate with clinical departments during system upgrades and deployments. **Infrastructure \& Network Support** * Support Windows desktop and server environments. * Troubleshoot LAN, WAN, Wi\-Fi, VPN, DNS, DHCP, and network connectivity issues. * Monitor system performance and proactively identify potential issues. * Support backup, disaster recovery, and business continuity processes. **Microsoft 365 \& Cloud Services** * Administer Microsoft 365 services including Exchange Online, Teams, SharePoint, and OneDrive. * Manage user accounts through Active Directory and Entra ID. * Support cloud\-based applications and services. * Assist with endpoint management using Microsoft Intune. **Cybersecurity \& Compliance** * Adhere to healthcare information security policies and procedures. * Support endpoint security, antivirus, and vulnerability management initiatives. * Ensure compliance with healthcare regulations and data protection requirements, including: * GDPR * JCI * Health Information and Quality Authority (HIQA) standards (Ireland) * Hospital cybersecurity policies * Maintain strict confidentiality regarding patient and staff information. **Device Deployment \& Asset Management** * Configure and deploy laptops, desktops, tablets, mobile devices, and clinical workstations. * Maintain accurate IT asset inventories. * Perform software installations, upgrades, and patch management. * Support device lifecycle management and hardware refresh projects. **Documentation \& Continuous Improvement** * Create and maintain technical documentation and knowledge base articles. * Document system changes and support procedures. Contribute to IT projects, migrations, and service improvement initiatives. * **Essential Qualifications** * Degree, diploma, or equivalent experience in Information Technology, Computer Science, or related discipline. * Minimum 3 years' experience in IT Support, Service Desk, Desktop Support, or Infrastructure Support. Full driving licence may be required for multi\-site hospital support. * **Essential Technical Skills** * Windows 10/11 administration * Microsoft 365 administration * Active Directory and Entra ID * Microsoft Intune and endpoint management * Hardware and software troubleshooting * Networking fundamentals (TCP/IP, DNS, DHCP, VPN) * Remote support tools * ITSM/Ticketing systems * Basic cybersecurity knowledge MATER PRIVATE NETWORK IS AN EQUAL OPPORTUNITIES EMPLOYER

title: IT Administrator (JD-0033)
description: **Overview** An IT Administrator is responsible for managing and maintaining an organization’s computer systems/ end points, networks, and IT infrastructure to ensure optimal performance, security, and user support. This role involves installing, upgrading, troubleshooting hardware and software, implementing security protocols, providing technical support, and coordinating IT operations across the organization. **Key Responsibilities** * Monitor and maintain computer systems to ensure optimal performance and uptime. * Install, upgrade, configure, and maintain hardware, software, and related IT equipment. * Implement security protocols including antivirus, data backup, and disaster recovery plans. * Manage user accounts, permissions, and access control to safeguard company data. * Provide technical support to end\-users for hardware, software, and network issues. * Perform diagnostic testing, troubleshooting, and debugging of IT systems. * Document IT processes, configurations, and troubleshooting procedures. * Implement IT policies and procedures to improve system efficiency and security. * Assist in onboarding new employees with necessary IT setups and training. * Stay updated with current technology trends and recommend upgrades or improvements. * Collaborate with vendors and external service providers as needed. **Required Skills And Qualifications** * B. Tech or equivalent * Relevant certifications such as Microsoft Certified IT Professional, CompTIA Network\+, or Cisco certifications are preferred * 8 \+ years of experience in IT administration or a similar role. * Strong knowledge of network infrastructure, operating systems (Windows, Linux, MacOS), and enterprise software. * Experience with server management, virtualization, and cloud services is a plus. * Excellent troubleshooting, problem\-solving, and organizational skills. * Good communication skills and ability to work independently or within teams. **Remuneration:** As per industry standards **Why Join Us:** At Sant Nirankari Health City, we offer a collaborative and supportive work environment where your contributions are valued and recognized. Join us in our mission to deliver exceptional healthcare services while upholding the highest standards of quality and patient care. Apply Now ← Back to Careers Page

title: IT Airport Engineer - Dublin Airport
description: **IT Airport Engineer \- Dublin Airport** Location: Dublin Airport, Ireland Contract Duration: 6\-Month Fixed\-Term Contract Salary: €30,000 per annum plus shift allowance €500 Hours: Rotational shift pattern covering 24x7 airport operation **About ESP Global Services** ESP Global Services is a leading global provider of technology support and managed services, delivering critical IT and infrastructure solutions across multiple industries worldwide. We are seeking Airport Engineers to join our dedicated on\-site team at Dublin Airport, supporting passenger processing technologies that are essential to airport and airline operations. This is an exciting opportunity to work in a fast\-paced, operationally critical environment where technology availability directly impacts the passenger journey. **About the Role** As an Airport Engineer, you will provide first\-line technical support, maintenance and operational assistance for passenger processing systems across the airport estate. You will be responsible for ensuring that passenger check\-in, self\-service kiosk and automated bag\-drop technologies remain fully operational and available to support airport operations. Working within a dedicated engineering team, you will diagnose and resolve hardware issues, perform preventative maintenance, support installations and upgrades, manage spare parts inventories and maintain accurate asset records. **Key Responsibilities** * Provide first\-line technical support for passenger processing systems, including: + Common Use Passenger Processing Systems (CUPPS) + Common Use Self\-Service (CUSS) Kiosks + Self\-Service Bag Drop (SSBD) equipment * Diagnose and resolve hardware faults, equipment failures and peripheral issues. * Perform preventative maintenance, inspections and cleaning activities to maximise equipment availability. * Replace and repair hardware components and field\-replaceable units. * Respond to incidents, service requests and operational alerts through the designated IT Service Management (ITSM) platform. * Support equipment installations, moves, additions and changes (IMAC activities). * Maintain accurate records of all supported equipment, including asset tags, serial numbers, locations, hardware changes, warranty information and maintenance history within the Configuration Management Database (CMDB), asset management and service management systems. * Ensure all equipment moves, additions, changes, repairs and replacements are accurately recorded and traceable throughout the asset lifecycle. * Manage spare parts inventory, warranty returns and stock control processes. * Work closely with airport operations, service desk and technical support teams to maintain agreed service levels. * Support continuous improvement initiatives and operational readiness across the airport environment. **Skills \& Experience** **Essential** * Previous experience in a desktop support, field engineering, hardware support or technical maintenance role. * Strong hardware troubleshooting and break\-fix experience. * Experience supporting Windows\-based devices, printers, scanners, touchscreens or self\-service technologies. * Experience using ServiceNow and/or other IT Service Management (ITSM) platforms. * Experience working within ticket\-driven support environments and to service level agreements (SLAs). * Ability to work independently in a customer\-facing operational environment. * Strong communication, organisational and problem\-solving skills. * Full driving licence and ability to travel between airport locations where required. **Desirable Only** * Experience within an airport, aviation, transport or other operationally critical environment. * Experience supporting kiosks, passenger processing systems or self\-service technologies. * Experience maintaining IT asset inventories, equipment records and Configuration Management Databases (CMDBs). * Experience supporting asset lifecycle management and inventory control processes. * Previous airside operational experience. **Shift Pattern** This role forms part of a dedicated engineering team providing support across a 24x7 airport operation. Candidates must be flexible to work a rotating shift pattern, including days, nights, weekends and public holidays, as required to maintain service coverage and operational resilience. **Security \& Airside Requirements** Due to airport security and airside access requirements, all successful candidates must be capable of obtaining and maintaining an airport security pass. Applicants must be able to provide a fully verifiable five\-year employment, education and address history. Any significant unexplained gaps, or periods that cannot be satisfactorily evidenced through references or supporting documentation, may affect eligibility for airport security clearance and airside access approval. **What We Offer** * Annual Salary of €30,000 plus shift allowance (pro\-rated) * Comprehensive product and technical training. * Opportunity to work within one of Ireland's busiest and most dynamic operational environments. * Experience supporting business\-critical passenger processing technologies. * Opportunity to work alongside a dedicated team of airport technology professionals. * Exposure to airport operations, infrastructure and passenger\-facing technologies. * Potential contract extension opportunities based on business requirements and performance. If you are a customer\-focused engineer who enjoys solving technical problems in fast\-paced operational environments and wants to play a key role in keeping passengers moving, we would like to hear from you. ESP Global Services is an equal opportunities employer and welcomes applications from all suitably qualified candidates.

title: IT Business Analyst
description: ***Why are we here?*** Eurofins Scientific is an international life sciences company, providing a unique range of analytical testing services to clients across multiple industries, to make life and our environment safer, healthier and more sustainable. From the food you eat, to the water you drink, to the medicines you rely on, Eurofins laboratories work with the biggest companies in the world to ensure the products they supply are safe, their ingredients are authentic, and labelling is accurate. Eurofins is dedicated to delivering testing services that contribute to the health and safety of society and the planet, and to its corporate responsibility to protect the environment and ensure diversity, equity, and inclusion across the entire network of Eurofins companies. **Job Description** **In a nutshell** The IT Business Analyst acts as the key bridge between business stakeholders and IT teams, ensuring business needs are translated into effective technical solutions. You will gather, analyse, and document requirements, working closely with Product Managers and development teams to deliver high\-quality systems. The role plays a critical part in driving alignment, collaboration, and successful IT project delivery across regions. **Where will you be based and what business will you support?** Based in Dublin, Ireland. You will be part of a global IT organisation, supporting business units, laboratory operations, and key stakeholders across regions, ensuring IT solutions align with business and operational goals. **How can you help us?** By acting as the key liaison between business and IT, ensuring requirements are clear, structured, and actionable. You will support successful project delivery through strong collaboration, effective requirement management, and hands\-on involvement throughout implementation and post go\-live phases. **What can we do for you?** We offer the opportunity to work on impactful, global IT projects within a collaborative and international environment, providing exposure to business\-critical systems, continuous learning, and professional growth opportunities. **Qualifications** **Are you our kind of extraordinary?** **You have:** * Bachelor’s degree in Information Systems, Computer Science, or related field * Proven experience in business and technical requirements analysis * Experience with Azure DevOps * Experience working on ERP implementations * Background in healthcare or clinical environments is a plus * English proficiency: minimum B2\+, ideally C1 ****Additional Information**** **We support your development!** Do you feel like you don’t match 100% of the requirements? Don’t hesitate to apply anyway! Eurofins companies are committed to supporting your career development. **We embrace diversity!** As an Equal Opportunity Employer, the Eurofins network of companies believes in strength and innovation through diversity. We prohibit discrimination against employees or applications based on gender identity and/or expression, race, nationality, age, religion, sexual orientation, disability, and everything else that makes employees of Eurofins companies unique. Find out more on our Careers page: https://careers.eurofins.com/ **Company description:** Eurofins Scientific is an international network of independent life sciences companies, providing a unique range of analytical testing services to clients across multiple industries, to make life and our environment safer, healthier and more sustainable. From the food you eat, to the water you drink, to the medicines you rely on, Eurofins laboratories work with the biggest companies in the world to ensure the products they supply are safe, their ingredients are authentic and labelling is accurate. The Eurofins network of companies believes that it is a global leader in food, environment, pharmaceutical and cosmetic product testing and in discovery pharmacology, forensics, advanced material sciences and agroscience contract research services. It is also one of the market leaders in certain testing and laboratory services for genomics, and in the support of clinical studies, as well as in biopharma contract development and manufacturing. It also has a rapidly developing presence in highly specialised and molecular clinical diagnostic testing and in\-vitro diagnostic products. In under 40 years, Eurofins has grown from one laboratory in Nantes, France to over 65,000 employees across a decentralised and entrepreneurial network of over 950 laboratories in over 1,000 independent companies across 59 countries. Eurofins companies offer a portfolio of over 200,000 analytical methods to evaluate the safety, identity, composition, authenticity, origin, traceability and purity of biological substances and products. The Eurofins network generated EUR 7\.296 billion revenues in FY 2025, and has been one of the fastest growing listed European companies for almost three decades.
